raw_consumer_statement: I received a bill for items bought at Home Depot that I did not purchase. I called the number on the bill and they said that they would investigate. I had not ever had a bill before that I can remember. I told them to cancel the account and they did. However, I received a notice that I still had to repay the bill and Citi Bank also sent me a collection notice. The items fraudulently purchased totaled over XXXX dollars and now they are sending me bills with late fees as well. Please help!
